title: Michael Camponovo
text:
Welcome to my professional portfolio.
I am a GIS educator, outreach coordinator, and community-engaged geospatial practitioner. This site documents selected work in teaching, GIS outreach, UAV education, community projects, student mentoring, and professional service.
